task_completion.description: Verify the Default Label and Attribute Code are set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Magento Admin attribute creation/edit page (Properties tab), 'Default Label' must be 'Material Origin'. Under 'Advanced Attribute Properties', 'Attribute Code' must be 'material_origin'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Input Type is set to Dropdown.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Properties tab, 'Catalog Input Type for Store Owner' must be set to 'Dropdown'.

task_completion.description: Verify all 5 specific dropdown options are added.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Under the 'Manage Options (Values of Your Attribute)' section, there must be exactly 5 rows with the values: 'Locally Sourced', 'Imported - Europe', 'Imported - Asia', 'Fair Trade Certified', and 'Recycled/Upcycled'.

task_completion.description: Verify the attribute is configured for search and comparison.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Storefront Properties' tab, the dropdowns for 'Use in Search', 'Visible in Advanced Search', and 'Comparable on Storefront' must all be set to 'Yes'.

task_completion.description: Verify the attribute is filterable in layered navigation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Storefront Properties' tab, 'Use in Layered Navigation' must be set to 'Filterable (with results)'.

task_completion.description: Verify the attribute is assigned to the 'Default' Attribute Set.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the 'Edit Attribute Set' page for the 'Default' set, the 'Material Origin' attribute must be visible in the middle column (assigned to a group like Product Details), and NOT in the right column ('Unassigned Attributes').

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Magento Admin GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the standard Magento 2 Admin panel interface (Stores > Attributes > Product, and Stores > Attributes > Attribute Set) rather than terminal commands or API testing tools.

integrity.description: Verify interaction with the actual application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should be a real web browser interacting with Magento, not a text editor, mockup, or static HTML page.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually saved the configurations.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for green success messages at the top of the screen such as 'You saved the product attribute.' and 'You saved the attribute set.' to confirm the forms were submitted.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The attribute must have the exact code 'material_origin' and label 'Material Origin'. The input type must be Dropdown (internally 'select'). It requires exactly 5 options: 'Locally Sourced', 'Imported - Europe', 'Imported - Asia', 'Fair Trade Certified', and 'Recycled/Upcycled'. Storefront properties must be enabled: Use in Search=Yes, Visible in Advanced Search=Yes, Comparable on Storefront=Yes, and Use in Layered Navigation=Filterable (with results). Finally, the attribute must be assigned to the 'Default' attribute set.
